tourGroups.microBrandsHighlight:
###### Highlights

**See Singapore with a global bus operator offering polished service & night tour upgrades!**

- Glide through the city of Singapore and see your favorite spots as many times as you like with the hop-on hop-off pass valid for 1 or 2 days.
- Switch between Red and Yellow lines at any time by simply hopping on and hopping off at any of the 36 stops.
- There's more! The 48-hour pass takes you on an English-guided night tour, whisking you away to the city's iconic spots illuminated against the night sky.
- All open-top buses feature Wi-Fi and audio guides with commentary in 7 languages to help you get to know Singapore better.
- Famous stops along your HOHO route include Fort Canning Park, Thian Hock Keng Temple, Chinatown, and more.
###### Route details

You can join the tour at any stop and hop on and off for the duration of your ticket.

**Hop-on Hop-off tour - Red line**
A ride through old-town charm: narrow lanes, heritage facades and vibrant neighbourhoods. You’ll pass through Little India, the cosy streets of Chinatown, Singapore and cultural corners, soaking in history, colour and local buzz.

- Popular stops: China Town, National Gallery of Singapore, Marina Bay


**Hop-on Hop-off tour - Yellow line**
Bright skyline glints, sleek towers and lush greenery; this route cruises past Gardens by the Bay, Orchard Road, Marina Bay Sands and leafy Botanic Gardens, mixing glitzy city vibes with serene nature in one comfy hop-on hop-off ride.

- Popular stops: Singapore Botanic Gardens, Singapore Art Museum, Raffles Hotel


**Night tour**

- Departure: 6:15pm from Suntec (3 Temasek Boulevard, Suntec City Mall Tower 2 #01-K8, Singapore 038983)
- Frequency: once a day
- Duration: 3 to 3.5 hours
###### Need to know

### What's not allowed

- Keep in mind that food & beverages (with the exception of screw-top bottles) and alcohol are not allowed on this experience. Pack wisely!
- Due to bus restrictions, pets cannot tag along for this experience.

###   

### Accessibility

- The buses (except upper decks) are wheelchair and pram/stroller accessible.
- Your guide dogs are welcome on the buses.

###   

### Additional information

- The tour remains closed for Chinese New Year's Eve.
- The night tour does not offer hop-on hop-off service.

topReviews.content: Fantastic!! Absolutely loved the night time tour. Driver Steven & guide (sorry forgot your name, male!!) ?? Were fabulous!! So knowledgeable 👌 10 out of 5

Vale la pena pagar por los dos días y el tour de noche, es más completo y a es a tu tiempo, por si llueve tienes más tiempo y flexibilidad. Los conductores son muy amables y los chicos que están indicando en la parada 0 donde reclamas tu tíquet, recomiendo llegar hasta Suntec city a la oficina y que ellos impriman el voucher para moverte ya que los conductores piden el mapa con el recibo que tiene la fecha, esto evita contratiempos.
topReviews.translatedContent: It's worth paying for the two-day pass and the night tour; it's more comprehensive and gives you more flexibility with your schedule. That way, if it rains, you'll have more time and flexibility. The drivers are very friendly, and the staff at Stop 0 where you pick up your ticket are helpful. I recommend going to the office at Suntec City and having them print your voucher before you go, since the drivers ask to see the map with the dated receipt—this helps avoid any issues.

topReviews.content:
Loved the fact that the air con works really  well and re-energises you for the next first into the humidity of Singapore. 
The audio commentary isn't 'dry' with entertaining titbits about the country and I thought that using 3 people on it was good.
The stops along the way in both red and yellow lines are well thought out and give a great overview of the city/ country culture.

The sites were accompanied by excellent commentary tapes. Staff very helpful and informative. And very friendly. If first time in Singapore highly recommended on day 1 to get your bearings. Well worth it.
It was difficult to find some bus stops as there were no signs at the stops. The audio commentary was very repetitive with information given about certain buildings either too early or too late.

tourGroups.microBrandsHighlight:
###### Highlights

**A cost-effective way to see Rome's major landmarks at your own pace.**

- Travel through Rome’s historic streets on a bus tour for 1 day, 1-run, or 24/48/72 hours, stopping at ancient sites, bustling piazzas, and iconic landmarks.
- With buses rolling up every 15-20 minutes, you can hop on and off at eight lively stops along the Pink Route without worrying about rigid schedules.
- If you like sightseeing with zero detours, grab the 1-run pass and see Rome’s top spots in a single seamless loop without ever stepping off the bus.
- Stay informed and connected with free WiFi, a handy route map, and an audio guide that spills all the tales of Rome in 12 languages.
- Ride past the Colosseum, where gladiators once battled, Piazza Barberini’s grand fountains, and Circus Maximus’ ancient chariot-racing track.
###### Route details

**Hop-on Hop-off tour - Pink route**
Journey through 2,000 years of jaw-dropping history, from ancient Rome's gladiatorial Colosseum to the Vatican's Renaissance splendor. This pink bus adventure whisks you past emperors' chariot-racing grounds at Circus Maximus, baroque fountains, Spanish Steps' elegance, and Michelangelo's breathtaking frescoes.
Popular stops: Colosseum, Piazza Barberini, and Trevi Fountain

**Note**: You can join the tour at any stop and hop on and off for the duration of your ticket.
###### Need to know

### Accessibility

- The buses are wheelchair accessible.


### Additional information

- The 1-run pass does not offer hop-on hop-off service.

topReviews.nonCustomerName: Wilhelmus Hendricus Anthonius van der Tas
topReviews.content: Natuurlijk het feit dat het een echte hop-on hop-off was, met Nederlandse audioguide. Alleen jammer dat op 3 van de 10 stoelen het systeem.je niet laat kiezen voor onze taal.
topReviews.translatedContent: Of course, the fact that it was a true hop-on hop-off tour, with a Dutch audio guide. It’s just a shame that on 3 out of 10 seats, the system doesn’t let you select our language.

topReviews.content: Es una experiencia diferente y divertida, lo bueno es que puedes repetir cuantas veces prefieras, abarcando diferentes opciones en las paradas, y si el día está lindo, con vistas privilegiadas durante el paseo. Lo incómodo es que no siempre encuentras asientos con buena vista.
topReviews.translatedContent: It’s a unique and fun experience. The best part is that you can take it as many times as you like, exploring different stops along the way, and if the weather is nice, you’ll enjoy great views during the ride. The downside is that you don’t always find seats with a good view.

topReviews.content: Pratique pour visiter plusieurs endroits. Explication audio très bien . Petit Bémol pour les tickets achetés endroits ligne pas pratique pour échanger.
topReviews.translatedContent: Convenient for visiting multiple locations. The audio guide is excellent. One minor drawback: tickets purchased online are not easy to exchange.

topReviews.content: Foi bem organizado e o passeio da uma ideia boa dos lugares mais bonitos de Roma vistos de longe. As historias contadas tqmbem forqm bem interessantes
topReviews.translatedContent: It was well organized and gave a good overview of Rome’s most beautiful sights as seen from a distance. The stories told were also very interesting.

topReviews.content:
There was good coverage of information about the city by the guide. It was very useful to be able to get off the bus and then get back on when it suited us.
We used the Hop On Hop Off bus at the start of our holiday to get a good idea of where we would like to go back to, for a better look on another day.
Would definitely recommend.

tourGroups.shortSummary: Grab this economical bus pass to Rome’s must-see spots with flexible duration options and enjoy double-decker views with an audio guide and free Wi-Fi.
tourGroups.highlights:
• Ride a double-decker bus through Rome’s ancient streets for 1-day, 1-run or 24/48/72 hours and explore this historic city your way.

  • Buses swing by every 10 to 15 minutes, so you can jump on and off at any of eight prime stops without waiting or losing momentum.

  • Short on time or just love a smooth ride? The 1-run pass gives you a full city tour in a single loop, no interruptions, just pure Roman magic on wheels.

  • Keep your trip stress-free with free WiFi, a trusty route map, and an audio guide packed with stories, history, and fun tidbits in multiple languages.

  • Cruise by the Colosseum’s towering arches, the ornate Triton Fountain at Piazza Barberini, and the sprawling Circus Maximus, where chariots once thundered.

tourGroups.microBrandsHighlight:
###### Highlights

**Italy’s most famous bus operator for quality service, frequent rides & great sightseeing!**

- Explore Rome’s wonders with an unlimited hop-on hop-off pass, valid for 1-day, 1-loop, 24, 48, or 72 hours – a perfect way to uncover the Eternal City.
- Glide along the Red Route, hopping on and off at ten stops, with buses arriving every 20 minutes, so you can explore every corner of Rome.
- Get on the double-decker bus, complete with free Wi-Fi, an audio guide in eight languages, and everything you need for a smooth sightseeing experience.
- Iconic landmarks await! Witness the Colosseum’s ancient remains, toss a coin in the Trevi Fountain, and climb the Spanish Steps.
###### Route details

**Hop-on Hop-off tour - Red route**
The Red route offers a vibrant journey through majestic ancient ruins like the Colosseum, the romantic Trevi Fountain’s sparkling waters, and the bustling Spanish Steps, all set within Rome’s sunlit piazzas and stately boulevards
Popular stops: Colosseum, Piazza Venezia, Santa Maria Maggiore

**Note**: You can join the tour at any stop and hop on and off for the duration of your ticket.
###### Need to know

### What's not allowed

- Keep in mind that bulky luggage or big backpacks are not allowed on the buses. Pack wisely!

### Accessibility

- Some of the buses are wheelchair accessible. This means wheelchair users can only board buses equipped with a footboard and dedicated space.
- The service provider allows only one wheelchair on the bus at a time.

### Additional information

- Small and medium-sized pets in leashes, muzzles, and pet carriers are allowed.
- The one-loop bus tour is not a hop-on hop-off tour.
- The 1-day pass is valid for one calendar day, whereas the 24-hour pass is valid for 24 hours from the time of activation. The passes cannot be activated on just any day; they must be activated within 5 days of the date printed on the voucher.
- Please check [here](https://cdn-imgix.headout.com/media/pdfs/e6e8f6121a6732ad77d3bbf8a4f6de18-City Sightseeing Roma - Summer Map and Timetable (1).pdf) for the route map and boarding points. Departures run daily from 9am to 6:30pm.

topReviews.content: We covered a lot of Rome's attractions- we did the Trevi Fountain, saw the Pantheon, walked up the Spanish steps and saw the Colloseum. The ability to hop on and off when and where you wanted was a great advantage.
Le passe file est super pratique. Il permet de ne pas perdre de longues heures attentes. L'accompagnement et les consignes de l'hôtesse est appréciable. C 👍
topReviews.translatedContent: The fast-track pass is super convenient. It saves you from wasting hours waiting in line. The hostess’s assistance and instructions are much appreciated. C👍

topReviews.content:
We waited at the stop for 10-15 minutes and then were told that stop had been cancelled and we had to walk to the next stop. My husband has a problem walking long distances and barely made the stop.
We did not see a few sights that we thought we would. Didn't see any part of the Vatican or Trevi fountain. Didn't expect to stop at these places but thought we would be able to get pictures.
On another note, the staff we dealt with were very accommodating and helpful.
Predivno iskustvo za razgledavanje znamenitosti predivnog Rima. Možeš izaći i ući kad god i ponovno nastaviti vožnju.
topReviews.translatedContent: A wonderful experience for sightseeing in beautiful Rome. You can get off and on whenever you like and resume the ride.

topReviews.content: L'idea è buona, ma si dovrebbe dare un limite alla gente che sale.
topReviews.translatedContent: It's a good idea, but there should be a limit on the number of people allowed to go up.

tourGroups.microBrandsHighlight:
###### Highlights

**See Sydney's sights on land by bus, upgrade for a cruise & a night tour!**

- Elevate your Sydney trip with this 24/48-hour hop-on hop-off pass, enjoying unlimited hops to see your favorite sights as many times as you like.
- Gain access to the Red and Blue routes and see 20+ sights near all Sydney must-see city sights and the eastern suburbs of Bondi.
- Upgrade for a 1-day hop-on hop-off cruise featuring Circular Quay, Taronga Zoo, plus a night tour to catch the city's sights after dark.
- With pre-recorded commentary available in 8 languages, enjoy the best stories and views of the city aboard the open-top double-decker.
- Some of the popular stops include the Sydney Opera House, Sydney Harbour Bridge, and Darling Harbour.
###### Route details

For the hop-on hop-off tour and cruise, you can join a tour at any stop and hop on and off for the duration of your ticket.
For the night tour, hop-on hop-off service is not available.

**Hop-on Hop-off Tour - Red Route**
The Red (City Tour) route loops through downtown, and you'll encounter a mix of historical landmarks, grand civic buildings, leafy parks, and vibrant shopping districts. Featured highlights include Macquarie Place Park, a peaceful heritage oasis beside historic Bridge Street, and the elegant façade of St Mary’s Cathedral, located near the Hyde Park Barracks Museum.
**Popular stops:** Sydney Opera House, Sydney Harbour Bridge, Rocks & Botanical Gardens

**Hop-on Hop-off Tour - Blue Route**
The Blue (Bondi Tour) features scenic coastal vistas, trendy neighborhoods, and the vibrant buzz of Sydney’s beach culture, illuminating the city’s outdoor lifestyle and sun-soaked charm. You'll pass by the Intersection on Oxford Street, renowned for fashion boutiques and stylish cafes, before the route heads towards the golden sands and surf at Bondi Beach itself.
**Popular stops:** Bondi Beach, Rose Bay & Double Bay

**Hop-on Hop-off Cruise Tour**

- First cruise: 7:35am from Circular Quay - Wharf 6 (9:15am during weekends & public holidays)
- Last cruise: 6:40pm from Circular Quay - Wharf 6 (5:05pm during weekends & public holidays)
- Frequency: every 15-60 mins
- Popular stops: Circular Quay, Taronga Zoo, Shark Island


**Night Tour**

- Departure: 7pm & 7:30pm from Stop #1 (Phillip Street, Circular Quay)
- Frequency: Twice every evening
- Duration: 1.5 hours


Click [here](https://cdn-imgix.headout.com/media/pdfs/0306f2a7dad85ab3bfaab0fae93f9ceb-Sydney_Night_Tour_Map.pdf) to see the night tour map.
###### Need to know

### What's not allowed

- Keep in mind that smoking is not allowed on the cruise.

### Accessibility

- The cruises and lower decks of the buses are wheelchair accessible.
- Ramps are available onboard and around the boarding areas for easy access.
- Mobility scooters and large wheelchairs are not allowed on the buses.
- Just a heads up, each bus can only accommodate 1 wheelchair at a time. If there is already a passenger in a wheelchair, please wait for the next one.
- Your guide dogs are welcome on the cruise.

### Additional information

- Make sure to check in with Big Bus first to receive your voucher for the hop-on hop-off cruise.
- The night tour does not include hop-on hop-off service.

topReviews.content: Great people at check in point. Enjoyed their knowledge and kindness

We used the ticket to do a circular tour of Sydney. That itself was ok although we stopped at 2 stops for well over 15 mins each so the whole journey took almost two hours (it says 45 to 1.30). The real time tracking of the buses isn't accurate. We waited at a stop for 40 mins before giving up and catching a "normal" bus. As the bus wasn't reliable we used it once in the 48 hours which made it massively expensive. The buses need to be more regular (meant to be 30 to 45 mins) and the live tracking needs to work. All in all not worth the £100 GBP cost.
Fabulous your on Red Route showing all main Sydney CBD highlights. Really enjoyable tour.  Loved The Rocks area.
Knowing more about buildings history. We enjoyed it. Traveling in the city by bus never experienced like this.
Great way to see highlights of Sydney in a short amount of time

tourGroups.microBrandsHighlight:
###### Highlights

**Hop-on hop-off, Explorer Bus through Blue Mountains. Flexible, easy.**

- **What’s included:** Travel the Red Route with unlimited hop-on hop-off access for 24 hours, covering ~29 stops through Katoomba and Leura. Highlights include Echo Point with views of the Three Sisters, Leura Cascades, and Katoomba Falls. Each ticket comes with pre-recorded commentary in English and a 72-page guidebook with suggested itineraries.
- **Who it’s for:** Independent travelers and families who want flexibility without missing iconic stops. Choose a pass-only option or bundle with Scenic World access and dining for a complete day.
###### Route details

You can join a tour at any stop and hop on and off for the duration of your ticket.

**Hop-on Hop-off Tour - Red Route**
This breathtaking route emphasizes the raw natural beauty of the UNESCO World Heritage area, focusing on dramatic cliffside vistas, lush rainforest canopies, and the thrilling wilderness experiences found at Scenic World.
**Popular stops:** Echo Point, Katoomba Falls, Scenic World

tourGroups.microBrandsHighlight:
###### Highlights

**Madrid hop-on hop-off at its best: 3 routes, 34+ landmarks, established quality, attractive pricing.**

- **Unlimited bus rides for 24/48 hours:** Don’t rush when you jump on, hop off, change plans mid-day. With three routes, you’re free to wander from grand royal landmarks to buzzing neighborhoods.
- **Drop off near 34+ stops:** Buses roll in every 30–60 mins, so exploring feels easy. Hop off at highlights like Templo de Debod, Santiago Bernabéu, and dozens more must-see spots.
- **Perks & amenities**: Plug into a 14-language audio guide (kids get their own too), slide open the roof for those blue-sky Madrid views, and score exclusive discounts, guided walks, and free drinks.
###### Route details

**Historic Madrid (Blue route)**
Expect royal-era architecture, old-world charm. The bus winds through grand boulevards and centuries-old plazas where wrought-iron balconies and stone façades steal the show.

- **Popular stops:** Art Triangle, Plaza de Cibeles, Puerta de Toledo, Royal Palace


**Modern Madrid (Green route)**
Sleek glass buildings rise, wide avenues open up, business hubs buzz, and contemporary design takes center stage. This route sweeps through Madrid’s polished, forward-looking side, where rooftop bars, stylish shopping zones, and bold architecture redefine the skyline.


- **Popular stops:** National Museum of Natural Sciences, Santiago Bernabéu Stadium, Nuevos Ministerios


**Actual Madrid (Orange route)**
This is everyday Madrid—layered, lively, and full of personality. The bus rolls through local hangouts, cultural pockets, and streets where classic taverns sit beside trendy cafés.

- **Popular stops:** Goya Street, Puerta de Alcalá, Las Ventas Bullring


**Walking tour (self-paid)**

- **Starting point:** 10:45am from Plaza Mayor
- **Frequency:** Once every day
- **Duration:** 2 hours
###### Need to know

### What's not allowed

- Smoking, large suitcases, or packages are not allowed on the buses.

### Accessibility

- This experience is wheelchair accessible. However, each bus can accommodate only one wheelchair.

### Additional information

- Small pets and animals in kennels or carriers are permitted onboard.
- Kindly note that the guided walking tour includes a small fee and mandatory registration. More details will be available on the bus.
- The complimentary drink can be availed after ticket validation on the bus.
- Specific details related to the add-ons in your tickets, like walking tours, will be shared post-booking.

**The ideal family pass with buses to 25 sights like Palm Jumeirah, a fun kids' audio guide & a sunset tour.**

- Hop on and off as many times as you like across 25 stops on the Red and Blue routes with buses arriving every 40 minutes throughout the day.
- Enjoy a magical 2-hour sunset and night tour seeing Dubai’s skyline shimmer as landmarks like the Burj Khalifa, Dubai Marina, glow in vibrant colors.
- Listen to audio guides in 11 languages, keep your kids hooked with a special kids' commentary in Arabic and English, and track your bus via the app.
- Visit sights like the Dubai Frame, Atlantis The Palm, Burj Khalifa, and an exclusive stop at JBR Beach, where you can swim, dine, or relax on the shore.
###### Route details

You can join the tour at any stop and hop on and off for the duration of your ticket.

**Hop-on hop-off tour - Red route**
Visit the Al Fahidi Historical District, Dubai Museum, Al Shindagha Museum & more sights on the red route to discover the diverse past of this grand city.
Popular stops: Dubai Mall, Gold & Spice Souk, Dubai Frame

**Hop-on hop-off tour - Blue route**
Cruise down the blue route and uncover Dubai's unique blend of cutting-edge modernity and centuries-old tradition, and also explore top city highlights along the way.
Popular stops: Atlantis The Palm, The Beach @JBR, Marina Promenade

**Sunset and night tour**
See Dubai come to life at night on this 2-hour bus tour, gliding through the city's top landmarks. Please note that although the night tour stops at a few major attractions, it is not a hop-on hop-off tour.
**Stops & timings**

- Stop 1 - The Dubai Mall - at 6pm
- Stop 2 - Mina Seyahi - at 6:45pm
- Stop 3 - Atlantis The Palm - at 7pm
- Stop 4 - Fairmont The Palm - at 7:05pm
- Stop 5 - Souk Madinat Jumeirah - at 7:20pm
- Stop 6 - Mall of the Emirates - at 7:30pm


Click [here](https://cdn-imgix.headout.com/media/pdfs/bb7104f762690f9744c724bc6e250e99-Dubai%20HOHO%20Route%20Map%20CSS-pages-deleted.pdf) to see the detailed night tour bus route map & its boarding points.
###### Need to know

### Accessibility

- The buses are wheelchair accessible.
- To reach Stop #1 from inside the mall, cross the pedestrian bridge on the 2nd floor of the Dubai Mall (near Caffe Nero).



### Additional information

- Specific details related to the add-ons in your tickets, like the sunset tour, will be shared in the ticket post-booking.
- The sunset and night tour does not offer hop-on hop-off service.
- Customer support locations include the Dubai Mall (Zabeel Bus Parking), Dubai Aquarium & Underwater Zoo (ground floor & second floor), Mall of the Emirates Gate 4 (Tourist bus parking next to Ski Dubai), Atlantis The Palm (Next to the monorail station), JBR The Beach (Amwaj next to KFC restaurant), & Souk Madinat Jumeirah (next to Seattle's Best Coffee).

###### Highlights

**See 14 Seville sights & upgrade to get guided tours, bike rentals, museum entries & more!**

- **Everything you get:** Gear up to explore top sights in Seville, including the Plaza de España, Giralda Tower, Triana & more on this 24/48-hour hop-on hop-off bus tour offering 360º views with a 15-language audio guide on the city’s history and culture.
- **Why choose this:** With buses arriving every 30 to 40 minutes, you can explore Seville flexibly and get on and off at stops an unlimited number of times.
- **Upgrades:** Enjoy free walking tours, bike rides, entry to popular spots like the Seville Aquarium or the Flamenco Dance Museum, discounts at local eateries & more.

You can join a tour at any stop and hop on and off for the duration of your ticket.
**Hop-on hop-off tour - Red route**
The Red route glides past sunlit plazas, iconic Giralda Tower, elegant bridges, and lively Triana streets, unveiling vibrant flamenco culture, lush Maria Luisa Park, and historic cathedrals; perfectly blending Moorish beauty, leafy boulevards, and bustling local life.

- Popular stops: Alameda de Hércules, Aquarium of Seville, Isla Mágica
###### Need to know

- This experience is wheelchair and pram/stroller accessible.
- Wheelchairs cannot be larger than 70cm wide, 120cm long, and 135cm high. You can contact the operator if your wheelchair exceeds these measurements, and they will assist you.
- Each bus can only accommodate one wheelchair at a time.

tourGroups.microBrandsHighlight:
###### Highlights

**Let the river be your guide to the stunning beauty of Lisbon's waterfront & top landmarks.**

- **Everything you get:** Enjoy the view over the City of 7 Hills, as Tagus shows you Lisbon's beautiful sights, free access Carris public trams, and audio guides in 4 languages. With departures every 2 to 3 hours, get discounts on monuments & leisure activities.
- **Why choose this:** This experience offers a great chance to escape the city bustle, enjoy Lisbon's beauty from a unique vantage point, & panoramic photo opportunities.
- **Sights covered:** You'll see the Cristo Rei, 25 de Abril Bridge, Praça do Comércio, MAAT Museum and Belem Tower on your tour.
###### Route details

**Hop-on Hop-off Route - Boat Tour** Float above the bustle, and enjoy privileged 7 Hills views and iconic Lisbon monuments from the Tagus. Popular stops covered: Cristo Rei, São Jorge Castle, 25th Abril Bridge
###### Need to know

### What to bring

- Carry a valid photo ID with the name matching your booking.

### What's not allowed

- Consuming any form of alcohol on the boat is strictly prohibited.
- Small pets are allowed, but only in animal carriers, and without occupying a seat.

### Accessibility

- Guide dogs are welcome on the boat without the need for a carrier.

### Additional information

- Passes are valid for 24 consecutive hours and are activated when your journey begins.
- Departure times are subject to change due to local traffic or weather conditions.
- The duration of the boat tour is 90 minutes, with departures every 2 to 3 hours.
- To access special offers, please validate the voucher first.
- Specific details related to the boat tour will be shared post-booking.

tourGroups.microBrandsHighlight:
###### Highlights

**Hop, stop, and float as you discover Prague with a bus tour and an optional river escape.**

- See the best of Prague with a 24 or 48-hour hop-on hop-off bus tour — ride freely and stop at the sights that catch your eye.
- Tick everything off your bucket list. Buses arrive every 30 to 60 minutes and take you past two routes dotted with 15 stops at iconic buildings and castles.
- Enjoy sky-high views of the city's Gothic spires and Baroque gems on the open-top buses as an audio guide in 25 languages keeps you entertained.
- Did you know Prague was built on the Vltava River shore? Nothing like a panoramic cruise along the majestic bridges and hills to see it all. Just upgrade and go.
- Soak in postcard-perfect sights like Prague Castle, Strahov Monastery, and Charles Bridge on your hop-on hop-off route.
###### Route details

You can join the tour at any stop and hop on and off for the duration of your ticket.
**Hop-on hop-off tour - Red line**
It offers access to key historical landmarks and cultural hubs across the city.

- Popular stops: Prague Castle, National Museum, Wenceslas Square


**Hop-on hop-off tour - Blue line**
This route offers a more scenic view of Prague’s architectural and historic highlights.

- Popular stops: Municipal House, Dancing House, Charles Bridge


**Vltava River cruise**

- Starting point: From Pier 3, Vltava River (Stop 8 Blue Line)
- First boat: 10am (Apr 1 to Sep 30), 12pm (Oct 1 to Mar 31)
- Last boat: 10pm (Apr 1 to Sep 30), 6pm (Oct 1 to Mar 31)
- Frequency: Every 30 minutes
- Duration: 60 minutes
###### Need to know

### Accessibility

- The buses on the Red line are wheelchair and pram/stroller accessible.
- The Blue Line is a single-deck panoramic bus.



### Additional information

- Keep in mind that boat tours are flexible, and there may be changes due to unexpected weather conditions.

topReviews.content: Friendly staff easy process and informative guide audio

tourGroups.microBrandsHighlight:
###### Highlights

**See 20 Budapest sights over 1-3 days with unlimited bus rides, get extra walking tours & discounts on cruises!**

- Dive into Budapest's charm with this 24/48/72-hour hop-on hop-off pass and hop on and off at your leisure, unlimited times.
- Glide through the city on a bus that leaves every 10 to 15 mins, whisking you away to 20 incredible stops near popular landmarks.
- How about a little extra? Your pass includes a guided walking tour and a 30% off on a 1-hour panoramic boat cruise along the Danube River.
- The double-decker bus has an immersive audio guide in 16 languages. So, listen up and discover the city's history.
- Take in the fleeting panorama of Budapest's revered sights like the Castle Garden, Parliament, St. Stephen’s Basilica, Heroes Square, and more.
###### Route details

You can join a tour at any stop and hop on and off for the duration of your ticket.
**Hop-on hop-off Tour - Red route**
The Red Route winds through Budapest’s grand avenues and riverbanks, linking St. Stephen’s Basilica, Parliament, Chain Bridge, Castle Garden and Heroes’ Square, while revealing thermal baths, elegant cafés, sweeping Danube views, and layers of imperial history along the way leisurely.
**Popular stops:** Hungarian State Opera House, Heroes' Square, New York Palace

**Danube River boat cruise (Not included in the ticket)**

- First cruise: 11am from Dock no. 6, Duna Korzó, in front of the Marriott Hotel
- Last cruise: 4pm from Dock no. 6, Duna Korzó, in front of the Marriott Hotel
- Frequency: every hour
- Duration: 1 hour


**Note**: The cruise is not included in the ticket. However, you can get a 30% off on the cruise upon presenting the bus ticket.
###### Need to know

### Accessibility

- The buses are wheelchair accessible.
- Wheelchairs must be no larger than 70cm wide, 120cm long, and 135cm high to board the bus. If unsure, contact the service provider.
- Just a heads up, each bus can only accommodate 1 wheelchair at a time. If there is already a passenger in a wheelchair, please wait for the next one.

###   

### Additional information

- The cruise is not included in the ticket. However, you can get a 30% off on the cruise upon presenting the bus ticket.
- The walking tour takes you through St. Stephen's Basilica, Parliament, Shoes on the Danube Bank, Váci Fashion Street, and Danube Promenade.

tourGroups.microBrandsHighlight:
###### Highlights

**Here's to the best of both worlds! Hit 18 Budapest sights on a bus & tune in to multilingual audio guides.**

- Traveling to Budapest? Grab this 1, 2, or 3-day hop-on hop-off bus pass with flexibility to get on and off unlimited times.
- Think flexibility and the Red Route will take you across 18 stops located near famous spots and the buses are scheduled every 10-20 mins.
- Show your Big Bus ticket and avail 30% off on an onsite purchase of a Danube River cruise ticket. Unlock Budapest from a whole new angle!
- Stay connected with free Wi-Fi and soak up the sights on the open-top deck. Also, dive deeper into the city's story with an audio guide in 16 languages.
- Spot iconic landmarks including the Eternal Flame, National Museum, Great Market Hall, and more along your route.
###### Route details

You can join a tour at any stop and hop on and off for the duration of your ticket.
**Hop-on Hop-off Tour - Red Route**
Discover Budapest's top landmarks, popular haunts, and underrated gems by riding down the red route of the hop-on hop-off tour.
**Popular stops:** Chain Bridge, Heroes’ Square, Matthias Church, Parliament
###### Need to know

### Accessibility

- The buses are wheelchair accessible.
- Require special accommodations for your disability? Rest assured as you can contact the service provider and they'll try to assist you.

### Additional information

- Your 30% discount on the Danube River Cruise can be availed by purchasing a ticket from Dock 6, Vigado 6-os dokk, Jane Haining rkp. 1052 Budapest. The original ticket price is €13 per person, while children under 6 years of age can travel for free.
- Your pets are welcome on the buses only in closed baskets, cages or pet carriers.

tourGroups.microBrandsHighlight:
###### Highlights

**Travel with a globally known operator, seeing top sights in this culturally rich city!**

- Discover Naples on a 24-hour hop-on hop-off tour, tracing its Roman roots while sampling the city's pizza history from your seat.
- With 20 stops on the Red and Blue routes, and buses running every 20-30 minutes, you can hop on and off as many times as you wish to savor the sights.
- Receive friendly assistance from onboard staff, listen to multilingual audio guides, and use WiFi to post snaps as you take in the open-top deck views.
- Unmissable sights dotted along the route – Explore the grand Royal Palace, Largo Castello's medieval charm, and Port San Gennaro's vibrant market vibes.
###### Route details

You can join the tour at any stop and hop on and off for the duration of your ticket. Please click here for the [detailed map](https://cdn-imgix.headout.com/media/pdfs/e6689d33e2b172a8a032cb08880b81de-City%20Sightseeing%20Naples%20-%20Map%20and%20Timetable%20-%20January%202026.pdf) and stops.

**Hop-on Hop-off tour - Red line**
The Red line wraps you in Naples’ storybook heart, gliding from grand castles and church-filled piazzas to treasure-crammed museums and alleyways perfumed with pizza, where crumbling palaces, street shrines, and noisy scooters paint the city’s beautifully chaotic soul.

- Popular stops: Dante Square, Archaeological Museum, Largo Castello
- First departure: 9:30am
- Last departure: 5:10pm
- Frequency: Every 20 mins


**Hop-on Hop-off tour - Blue line**
The Blue line is your breezy, big‑view escape, cruising Naples’ curvy coastline past palm-lined promenades, chic Chiaia boutiques, sunsety Mergellina and cliff-hugging Posillipo, where Vesuvius and the glittering bay constantly photobomb your daydreams.

- Popular stops: Capo Posillipo, Mergellina, Posillipo
- First departure: 9:45am
- Last departure: 5:15pm
- Frequency: Every 30 mins
###### Need to know

### What's not allowed

- Keep in mind that bulky luggage and backpacks are not allowed on this experience. Pack wisely!

### Accessibility

- This experience is wheelchair accessible but has only one dedicated space. The wheelchair will be allowed onboard only if the bus is equipped with a footboard.

### Additional information

- Your pets are allowed on board only if they are non-aggressive, leashed and muzzled, or kept securely in a pet carrier for everyone’s comfort.

topReviews.content: Lo mejor del tour es la linea azul. Los lugares visitados y las vistas son espectaculares.  Nos encanto. Es como para repetirlo..
Les deux tours sont intéressants,  possibilité de stationnement au niveau du départ et arrivée principal près du chateau. Les commentaires sont utiles mais parfois difficiles à comprendre.
topReviews.translatedContent: Both tours are interesting, and there is parking available at the main starting and finishing points near the castle. The commentary is helpful but can sometimes be hard to understand.

topReviews.content: Anzitutto i luoghi panoramici, ma soprattutto la flessibilità di poter  scegliere dove fermarsi e di ripartire quando si vuole
topReviews.translatedContent: First and foremost, the scenic spots, but above all the flexibility to choose where to stop and set off again whenever you want

topReviews.content:
Hat alles gut geklappt. Allerdings muss ich Abzug geben. Wir waren mit einem Rollstuhlfahrer unterwegs, das Personal war sehr freundlich und hat geholfen, es gab einen Platz für den Rolli. An diesem Platz kann der Rollifahrer aber leider nicht viel der Umgebung sehen, da genau dort die Scheibe mit Folie beklebt ist, das ist nicht so richtig gut durchdacht, außerdem sitzt der Rollifahrer nicht erhöht, wie alle anderen , so dass er quasi nur aus der einen Seite raus schauen kann und da ist die Folie davor. 
Da ist noch Lift nach oben.
Ansonsten sind die Fahrer alle wirklich ordentlich durch das Verkehrschaos in Neapel gefahren.
topReviews.translatedContent:
Everything went well. However, I have to give it a lower rating. We were traveling with a wheelchair user; the staff was very friendly and helpful, and there was space for the wheelchair. Unfortunately, from that spot, the wheelchair user can’t see much of the surroundings because the window is covered with film right there—that’s not really well thought out. Plus, the wheelchair user isn’t seated higher up like everyone else, so they can basically only look out on one side, and there’s the film blocking the view. 
There’s also a lift to the upper level.
Otherwise, the drivers all navigated the traffic chaos in Naples really well.

topReviews.content: Gostei da organização que foi fácil e com muitos autocarros, a linha da Costa com vistas de cortar a respiração. Foi um porto seguro no meio da cidade que é muito movimentada. A experiência correu muito bem no geral.
topReviews.translatedContent: I liked how well-organized it was—it was easy to navigate and there were plenty of buses, and the coastal route offered breathtaking views. It was a peaceful haven in the middle of the bustling city. Overall, the experience went very well.

tourGroups.microBrandsHighlight:
###### Highlights

**Tour Milan with a top-tier global brand and track your next bus in real time as you go.**

- Flexibly explore top sights in Milan with a 24/48/72-hour hop-on hop-off bus pass and jump on and off the bus as many times as you want.
- With 4 lines and 40+ stops, and buses arriving every 20 to 90 minutes, you can enjoy a hassle-free sightseeing experience.
- Kick back in your open-top upper-deck seat and take in panoramic views while listening to a multilingual audio guide on the city’s history & culture.
- Unlock digital walking tours, transforming Brera, Galleria, and more, into your playground, right from your phone.
- Explore the Milan Cathedral, Sforza Castle, Parco Sempione, Arco della Pace, and other hotspots on your tailored journey.
###### Route details

You can join the tour at any stop and hop on and off for the duration of your ticket.

**Hop-on Hop-off Route - Historical Line (Red Route)**
This line is the essential circuit for historical landmarks, linking the magnificent Sforza Castle to the iconic Duomo and the elegant Montenapoleone fashion district.
**Popular stops:** Duomo, Sforza Castle, Montenapoleone

**Hop-on Hop-off Route - Modern Line (Blue Route)**
The blue route route focuses on the city's modern side, connecting the Central Station, sleek skyscrapers, and beautiful public gardens.
**Popular stops:** Stazione Centrale, Palazzo Lombardia, Duomo

**Hop-on Hop-off Route - Navigli Line (Yellow Route)**
A brilliant mix of art and bohemian flair awaits on the yellow route. It connects the city center to the lively Navigli canal district.
**Popular stops:** Navigli, Cenacolo, Duomo

**Hop-on Hop-off Route - Sport Line (Green Route)**
This route explores Milan's sporting soul, taking you out to the legendary San Siro Stadium and the modern architectural marvels of the CityLife area.
**Popular stops:** Stadio San Siro, Casa Milan, CityLife
###### Need to know

- The buses are accessible to wheelchair and pram/stroller users.
- Small and medium-sized pets with a leash or muzzle or in a carrier are welcome onboard.
- The tour does not operate on Dec 25.
- Get the 72-hour weekend pass (valid on Saturday and Sunday) between June and September, and enjoy a free ticket for the Milan Night Tour.

topReviews.content: The audio was a little off key as when it said look left and you'll see a particular monument or something it was either too early or too late and I saw nothing of significance except what I considered photo worthy myself. It was a very hot day and of course in an open tip bus there's no air conditioning 🙃

I only rode on two of the buses, the red and yellow lines. The second bus rode the same route for a while as the first one. However my main disapointment was the audio guide. The audio guide played music a lot and did not provide enough information about the sites we were seeing on the ride. So, we decided not to ride the other buses for that reason.

Маршрутите в Милано са много добре планирани, има озвучаване на различни езици, човек веднага разбира какво вижда и кратка история на сградата или мястото. Ние избрахме жълтата и червената линия и не сгрешихме. Билетите ни бяха за 24 часа и ги използвахме пълноценно.

The Hop on Hop off bus is a fantastic way to see the city sights when you don't have a lot of time and you want to cover a lot of ground! It's also very relaxing to be driven around sitting on top in the open air. Great experience!

The problem of the being left to find a way back because of whst was happening at the cathedral that afternoon. Lucky we got back to the stop at the Dumo in a quick time to have one help us find a way to get back to Centrale.

tourGroups.microBrandsHighlight:
###### Highlights

**Take your time in Genoa—where history and sea views create the perfect blend.**

- Unlock centuries of captivating tales and magnificent structures as you soak up the sights with an unlimited 24/48-hour tour of Genoa.
- Explore the city at your own pace across two diverse routes featuring 22 engaging stops, which you can hop on and off every 30 minutes.
- Enhance your journey with a complimentary self-guided walking tour, complete with an audio guide available in 6 languages.
- Listen to fascinating facts and local stories in 8 languages from the comfort of double-decker buses, and stay connected with free Wi-Fi.
- Step off to wander through the historic Old Port, marvel at the grandeur of Piazza De Ferrari, or discover the picturesque charm of the Boccadasse Fishing Village.
###### Route details

**Historical or Red Route**
This route deeply explores Genoa's historic center, showcasing its grand palaces, civic squares, and cultural landmarks, reflecting its rich maritime past and artistic heritage, including UNESCO sites.
Popular stops: Aquarium of Genoa, Via Garibaldi, Piazza De Ferrari

**Coastline or Blue Route**
The coastline route highlights Genoa's beautiful waterfront, offering stunning sea views and access to charming seaside districts, connecting you to popular family attractions along the Ligurian Sea.
Popular stops: Boccadasse, Levante Waterfront, Old Port
###### Need to know

- This experience is wheelchair accessible. Buses can accommodate one wheelchair at a time.
- Children up to 4 years old can travel for free.
- Small and medium-sized pets are allowed on-board, provided they are on a leash or in pet carriers. They must not disturb any other passengers.
- Due to safety reasons, any kind of luggage or bulky backpacks are not allowed on the bus.
- Retain & display your ticket to receive a 10% discount on the next tour at other national and international City Sightseeing® tours! Terms and conditions apply.

tourGroups.microBrandsHighlight:
###### Highlights

**One ticket with unlimited transport, 25 sightseeing stops, and discounts at 210 places across Vienna.**

- **Everything you get with the Vienna City Card:** Unlimited access to Vienna's trams, buses, and metro lines for your pass duration, no separate tickets. Activate instantly via the ivie app and start exploring. Enjoy discounts at 210 locations across attractions, restaurants, shops, and hotels. Click [here](https://cdn-imgix-open.headout.com/hop-on-hop-off/Vienna_Map.pdf) for the HOHO bus route map.
- **Everything you get with the hop-on hop-off tour:** A 24-hour unlimited pass across 2 routes and 25 stops, covering St. Stephen's Cathedral, Hofburg Palace, the Ringstrasse, and more. Buses run frequently, so you move at your own pace, with a free audio-guided walking tour included to explore the city centre on foot.
- **Why choose this combo:** One card replaces your public transport ticket, sightseeing bus pass, walking tour booking, and attraction discounts. It's the most cost-efficient way to cover Vienna, whether you're hopping between palaces or wandering neighbourhoods.
- **Upgrades:** Extend your card validity to 48 or 72 hours for maximum city coverage, or pick the option that includes airport transfers in comfortable vehicles for added convenience.
###### Need to know

- The app is available on both [iOS](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/ivie-wien-guide/id1486840263?ls=1) and [Android](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=at.vienna.ivie).
- Your card can be activated within a period of 365 days from purchase. It is valid for 24/48/72 hours (depending on options selected) from your first use.
- When purchasing a Vienna City Card, you will receive an 8-digit code that can be redeemed in the ivie app.

tourGroups.microBrandsHighlight:
###### Highlights

- Heading to Berlin? Make the most of your trip with an unlimited hop-on hop-off bus pass, your best friend for 24, 48, or 72 hours. 
- Experience the seamless single-route journey with 20+ stops. Boarding is a breeze with buses scheduled every 20-25 mins, ensuring you never wait long.
- Score an extra perk: a 1-hour optional Spree River boat trip. Great vibes, scenic views, see Berlin from a whole new angle. 
- Dive into history with the 20-language audio guide on the open-top bus. Got kids? They'll love the guide narrated by Santiago Ziesmer, aka SpongeBob's voice. 
- Some key landmarks you'll see on the way are Alexanderplatz, the TV Tower, Kulturforum & Kreuzberg.

###### Route details

Please click [here](https://cdn-imgix.headout.com/media/pdfs/48f6c7366d9982547572a75ed0c4301a-City%20Circle%20Berlin%20Hop-On%20Hop-Off%20Tour.pdf) for a detailed route map and its boarding points. 

You can join a tour at any stop and hop on and off for the duration of your ticket.


- First bus: 9:30am from stop #1 (Kurfürstendamm) 
- Last bus: 5:43pm from stop #1 (Kurfürstendamm) 
- Last full tour: 3:30pm from  stop #1 (Kurfürstendamm) 
- Frequency: every 20-25 mins
- Popular stops: Checkpoint Charlie, Karl-Marx-Allee, Brandenburg Gate

**Boat tour**

- First bus: 11am from Weidendamm and St. Nicholas Quarter
- Last bus: 4pm (5:30pm on Fri & Sat) from Weidendamm and St. Nicholas Quarter
- Frequency: every 30-60 mins 


###### Need to know

- Tip: Get off at the East Side Gallery to see a section of the Berlin Wall covered in artwork. This is a must-see for art enthusiasts. 
- The buses are wheelchair and pram/stroller accessible.
- Ramps are available for easy access.
- Just a heads up, each bus can only accommodate 1 wheelchair at a time. If there is already a passenger in a wheelchair, please wait for the next one.
- Your furry friends are welcome onboard. Just make sure they don't take up a seat and are safe and friendly to fellow passengers.
- Jump off at stop 14 (DomAquarée) or stop 16 (Unter den Linden/Friedrichstraße) to catch your boat tour. It's the perfect way to maximize your tour.

###### Highlights

tourGroups.microBrandsHighlight:
###### Highlights

**See 20 Berlin sights by bus with tour upgrades & a chance to try real currywurst!**

- Start your Berlin sightseeing journey on a hop-on hop-off bus tour with 3 passes valid for 24 or 48 hours.
- Access up to 20 stops along the carefully planned Red and Blue routes as buses arrive every 20 to 60 mins.
- Optional perks with the 48-hour pass. Guided tours, day and evening bus tours, and a free voucher for Berlin’s iconic snack, currywurst. That's a sweet deal, right?
- Onboard, get a multilingual audio guide, free Wi-Fi, and open-air deck views galore.
- Some of the most popular landmarks on your route include the Reichstag, Brandenburg Gate, Television Tower, and more.
###### Route details

You can join a tour at any stop and hop on and off for the duration of your ticket.
**Hop-on hop-off tour - Red route**
This is your classic Berlin blitz, a time-travel journey past the city's most famous landmarks. You'll gawk at the Brandenburg Gate, trace the ghostly path of the Berlin Wall, and feel the buzz of Potsdamer Platz, all while hearing tales of kings, emperors, and Cold War spies.

- Popular stops: Museum Island, Brandenburg Gate, Checkpoint Charlie


**Hop-on hop-off tour - Blue route**
Trade grand monuments for gritty creativity on this route through Berlin's vibrant heart. Cruise from the world-class art on Museum Island to the funky street art of Hackescher Markt, discovering the trendy cafes and bohemian spirit that make this city so effortlessly cool.

- Popular stops: Karl-Marx-Allee, East Side Gallery


**Evening tour**

- Departure: 6pm from stop #1 (Alexanderplatz)
- Frequency: once a day
- Duration: 75 mins


**Panoramic tour**

- First bus: 11am from Kurfürstendamm 10
- Last bus: 3am from Kurfürstendamm 10
- Frequency: thrice a day
- Duration: 90 mins


**Walking tours**

- German tour departure: 11:30am from stop #4 (Brandenburg Gate)
- English tour departure: 2pm from stop #4 (Brandenburg Gate)
###### Need to know

### Accessibility

- The buses are wheelchair accessible.
- Require special accommodations for your disability? Rest assured, as you can contact the service provider and they'll try to assist you.

###   

### Additional information

- Small animals are welcome onboard, but they must be in enclosed baskets, cages, or pet carriers.
- Family tickets (2+2) are available.

tourGroups.microBrandsHighlight:
###### Highlights

- Explore Hiroshima's history at your leisure with a 1-day unlimited HOHO bus pass.
- An audio guide is available in 4 languages — English, Chinese, Japanese and Korean.
- Enjoy discounts and complimentary beverages at various tourist destinations, including Hiroshima-jo Castle, the Hiroshima Peace Memorial Museum, as well as local okonomiyaki eateries and cafes.
- Stay connected with free Wi-Fi on board, allowing you to share your experiences in real time.
- Both the Green and Orange Routes pass by the world heritage sites of the Atomic Bomb Dome and Peace Memorial Park.


###### Route details

**Orange Route**

- First bus: 10am from Hiroshima Sta. Shinkansen Entrance (Platform 2)
- Last bus: 5pm from Hiroshima Sta. Shinkansen Entrance(Platform 2)
- Popular stops: Atomic Bomb Dome, Peace Memorial Park, Hiroshima City Museum of Contemporary Art

**Green Route**

- First bus: 9:30am from Hiroshima Sta. Shinkansen Entrance (Platform 2)
- Last bus: 5:30pm from Hiroshima Sta. Shinkansen Entrance( Platform 2)
- Popular stops: Atomic Bomb Dome, Peace Memorial Park, Hiroshima Toshogu Shrine

Please click [here](https://cdn-imgix.headout.com/media/pdfs/2b9ccfbf18cfa53481c7c29e5d39fe89-2023_ml_map_en_han.pdf) for a detailed route map and its boarding points.



###### Need to know

- Tip: Within the Atomic Bomb Dome, there is a compact museum that offers additional context and details regarding the bombing and its aftermath. Don't miss out on visiting it as it gives you a deeper understanding of this somber event in history.
- Facilities: Free Wi-Fi
- The itinerary may change due to weather, traffic, or other conditions.

tourGroups.microBrandsDescriptor: Mobile Tickets, Flexible Timings, Free WiFi, Audio Guide, Free Cancellation
tourGroups.microBrandsHighlight:
###### Highlights 
- Explore all the major landmarks of the Danish capital, Copenhagen with this 24-hour hop-on hop-off ticket. 
- Travel along the Red Route on the double-decker buses, with 22 major stops dotted along the way. 
- Want more? You can also upgrade to a 1-hour boat cruise along with your HOHO pass. 
- Get to know more about the locations you pass by through a multilingual audio guide available onboard in 10 languages.
- The most popular stops on your HOHO route include the Amalienborg Palace, the statue of Little Mermaid, Tivoli Gardens and more.

###### Route details
**Red Route**

- First bus: 9am from stop #1 (Copenhagen Central Station)
- Last bus: 4pm from stop #1 (Copenhagen Central Station)
- Frequency: throughout the day
- Popular stops: Tivoli Gardens, National Museum of Denmark, Amalienborg Palace

**Blue Route**

- First boat: 10am from (Nettobådene)
- Frequency: every 20mins 

Please click [here](https://cdn-imgix.headout.com/media/pdfs/4fd3ab7a75dfec244799a595e0a53241-Hop-On%20Hop-Off%20Tour%20of%20Copenhagen%20.pdf) for detailed Red and Blue route maps and their boarding points. 

###### Need to know
- Tip: To make the most of your tour drop off at stop 8 or 9 and you can visit both Nyhavn and Royal Danish Playhouse, which are just a stone's throw away. 
- The buses are wheelchair accessible. 
- Children aged 0-2 years can travel for free on buses when accompanied by a paying adult (max 2 children per adult).

tourGroups.microBrandsHighlight:
###### Highlights

- Rome is one of Europe's oldest occupied cities and is known for its awe-inspiring art, ancient ruins, and vibrant street life.
- It also has a surprising amount of snazzy shopping districts and quirky bars. 
- On this 72-hour hop-on, hop-off walking tour, follow local guides through the inner secrets of the city. 
- Stroll past some of the most famous world monuments, like the Colosseum, St. Peters Basilica, and the Trevi Fountain. 
- Your guides will tell you fun stories and anecdotes throughout the journey, on two all-encompassing routes.
- If you feel like making a quick pit stop at a pizzeria your local guide pointed out, you can leave the tour and rejoin later. 
- Take the time to listen to the audio and navigation functionality, and explore the suggested itineraries and walking routes. 
- On the Vox City app, you will also be directed towards the nearest free wifi spots and charging points.  
- Go on 4 self-guided tours with multilingual audio commentary whenever you wish.
- You can even discover the best locations for photo opportunities, all offline.
- Whenever you feel ready to rejoin the guided tour, simply use the app to auto-locate your nearest guide. 

###### Tips & Information
- Download the Vox City App in the Play Store or Apple Store.
- Scan the QR code on your voucher and download the map in your preferred language.
- Tours start from 10am. Use your Vox City app to track your guide and book your spot.



###### Languages

- Live Guide Commentary: English 
- Pre-recorded audio commentary: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish, Russian, and Chinese audio commentary



###### Cancellation Policy

- Get a full refund on canceling this ticket up to 24 hours before the schedule.
